{{Quote|Dunari's Casino? That place has a... colorful reputation.|[[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]]|audio=R000240.flac|<ref name="XWA" />}}
'''Dunari's Rest''' was a casino/resort [[Space station/Legends|space station]] and minor trading facility, located in the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
[[File:DrinkChit-XWA.png|thumb|left|150px|A drink chit from Dunari's Rest]]
Owned by [[Dunari]], a friend of the [[Azzameen family]], Dunari's Rest was popular with legitimate traders like [[Emon Azzameen]] and less savory individuals such as [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. Even [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] was known to have visited the facility.

Constructed by [[GrayMor Engineering Corporation]] under a private contract from Dunari, the station had a crew of 1,250 and could accommodate up to 15,000 guests. Though the station was unarmed, it was well defended, with shields as strong as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|Strike Cruiser's]]. It was also guarded by an [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|IPV/1 system patrol craft]], the aptly named [[Bouncer (starship)|''Bouncer'']].

Dunari's was frequented by spacers seeking refreshment, and the bar issued chits which were valid in exchange for drinks at the station. The drink chit was embossed with an image of a bottle identical to [[Zairona Ale]], perhaps subtly advertising the availability of illegal substances at the station. In one incident shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], Emon Azzameen gave his brother [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] one of these chits after the pair were asked to leave the station for attacking the [[Viraxo Industries|Viraxo]]-allied starship ''[[Enkidu]]''.

[[File:LuxuryPass-XWA.png|thumb|left|150px|A Dunari's Rest luxury pass]]
Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] employed Dunari to assist in procuring much-needed supplies. Dunari's Rest served as a transit point for these shipments. Unfortunately, this led to the facility's capture by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in a raid led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]]. Holtz was tipped off by the [[Hurrim]], who were angered when Dunari interfered in their [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] operations.

For saving the station from destruction and covering the evacuation of the allied smugglers, Dunari gave Ace a luxury pass to the resort, entitling him to VIP treatment. The main Hurrim base and the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] were destroyed shortly thereafter.

==Strength and customers==
The following ships belonged to or were in cooperation with Dunari.
*[[Ferryboat liner]] ''[[En'aid]]''
*Ferryboat liner ''[[Siol]]''
*Ferryboat liner ''[[Wind Runner]]''
*[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] [[Orion (Lambda-class)|''Orion'']]
*[[Muurian transport]] [[Rigel (transport)|''Rigel'']]
*Muurian transport [[Stardust (transport)|''Stardust'']]
*[[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transport]] ''[[Leena]]''
*[[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] [[Bouncer (starship)|''Bouncer'']]
*[[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] ''[[Raw Deal]]''
*Muurian transport ''[[Deadman's Hand]]''
*[[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser]] [[Longshot (Dreadnaught-class)|''Longshot'']]

==Behind the scenes==
The lighted signs on the top of the station are not in [[High Galactic/Legends|High Galactic alphabet]] or [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]]. The least blurred textures have characters that are recognizable as being written in the [[Tionese/Legends|Greek alphabet]].

An unused radio message was included in the first [[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance|''X-wing Alliance'']] mission file that featured Dunari's Rest. After [[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]] spoke the quote featured above, Emon Azzameen would have said, "It'll be great, Emkay, we can all get a nice lube job! You can even get your nuts tightened!"
